dialogue_summary: Plan a relaxed, low-walking one-day NYC itinerary for the user's visiting parents (staying near Parsons), including meals, iconic sightseeing, and rest breaks, then refine specific meal choices and add bad-weather backup/rest options.

outcomes.description: One-day NYC itinerary (morning-to-evening) tailored to parents' interests and mobility constraints, including meals, sightseeing, rest breaks, and low-walking transportation guidance
